title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Atos India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Atos India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Atos India Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Hyderabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Atos India Advisory Limited:
Atos India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atos India Advisory Limited!
